productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Verve Tee Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey wide neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with grown-on sleeves, seam lining tape on inner back neck, graphic print on the front, brand tag on lower side seam and logo printed on lower hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40°C Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, do not tumble dry, do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Look funky and feminine in this graphic tee from adidas – the grown-on sleeves give a fashion-forward look while the adidas print gives a Sports-wear feel. Team this with denim shorts, mini skirts and adidas shoes for casual outings with friends or wear it to the gym to look great working out. Model's statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.7" and chest 33"
